rulings.Case Title: LARRELL FORTNER et al VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order And Sealing Of Confidential Materials And For Order Allowing Discovery Regarding Disclosure Of The Confidential Document
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 7, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc.¿s motion for protective order and sealing of confidential materials and for an order allowing discovery regarding disclosure of the confidential document: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am, not 9:00am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ELROY PORCHIA et al VS. 3M COMPANY, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN INTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Its Request For Admissions; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 7, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Carrier Corporation¿s motion to compel further responses to its requests for admissions and request for sanctions is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)
